code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0

  while i < n
    # skip whitespace
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end

    if i < n
      # read sign
      mut sign = 1
      let first = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if first == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if first == 43
        i = i + 1
      end

      # read digits
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(v)
            v
          when None
            -1
          end
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end

      let signed = val * sign
      if signed > 0
        total = total + signed
      else if signed < 0
        total = total - signed
      end
    end
  end

  println("r=#{total}")
end
